description:
CRITICAL: `git add -A` at git-workflow-service.ts line 511 stages ALL changes in a worktree, including `.automaker/features/**/feature.json` files. Since feature.json is tracked by git, worktree commits capture stale feature state from the branch point. When merged to main, this overwrites current feature data.

**Root cause confirmed by deep dive agent (a16d1b3):**
- Worktree branches show ALL 7 features as `deleted file mode 100644` in diff vs main
- If merged as-is, these branches would DELETE all features from main
- Server writes feature updates to MAIN project path, not worktrees
- `git add -A` blindly stages everything including `.automaker/` state

**Fix:**
Replace `git add -A` with `git add -A -- ':!.automaker/'` (or equivalent pathspec) in git-workflow-service.ts line 511. This excludes `.automaker/` from agent commits entirely.

**File:** apps/server/src/services/git-workflow-service.ts (line 511)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `git add` in worktrees excludes `.automaker/` directory
- Agent code changes still stage correctly
- Feature.json files in worktrees are never committed by agents
- Existing tests pass
title: Fix git add -A to exclude .automaker/ in worktree commits

descriptionHistory.description:
CRITICAL: `git add -A` at git-workflow-service.ts line 511 stages ALL changes in a worktree, including `.automaker/features/**/feature.json` files. Since feature.json is tracked by git, worktree commits capture stale feature state from the branch point. When merged to main, this overwrites current feature data.

**Root cause confirmed by deep dive agent (a16d1b3):**
- Worktree branches show ALL 7 features as `deleted file mode 100644` in diff vs main
- If merged as-is, these branches would DELETE all features from main
- Server writes feature updates to MAIN project path, not worktrees
- `git add -A` blindly stages everything including `.automaker/` state

**Fix:**
Replace `git add -A` with `git add -A -- ':!.automaker/'` (or equivalent pathspec) in git-workflow-service.ts line 511. This excludes `.automaker/` from agent commits entirely.

**File:** apps/server/src/services/git-workflow-service.ts (line 511)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `git add` in worktrees excludes `.automaker/` directory
- Agent code changes still stage correctly
- Feature.json files in worktrees are never committed by agents
- Existing tests pass
